tagline: Don't just watch the future happen. Build it.
welcomeDescription: Welcome to the collegiate engineering hub. We build, program, and iterate autonomous machines, hardware-in-the-loop control scripts, and multi-agent coordination frameworks designed for real-world impact.

membership.title: Choose Robotics Club Membership
membership.description: Welcome to the collegiate engineering hub. We build, program, and iterate autonomous machines, hardware-in-the-loop control scripts, and multi-agent coordination frameworks designed for real-world impact.

perks.title: Unlimited Lab Projects
perks.desc: Create as many as you need

pillars.title: Hardware Systems
pillars.desc: Design custom printed circuit boards (PCBs), prototype high-frequency sensory interfaces, and deploy low-latency microcontrollers.

pillars.title: Autonomous Control
pillars.desc: Implement real-time sensor fusion filter matrices, Robot Operating System (ROS) telemetry node configurations, and neural perception.

pillars.title: Mechanical Modeling
pillars.desc: Create advanced 3D CAD schematics, perform stress tests under simulation engines, and fabricate components with 3D print units.

team.name: Aravind Sharma
team.expertise: Embedded C++, ROS2 Architecture, PCB Design

pastEvents.title: Autonomous Maze Solver Competition
pastEvents.description: Custom micromouse robots navigating a physical 16x16 grid maze autonomously using infrared ranging sensors.

pastEvents.title: Drone Assembly & Telemetry Workshop
pastEvents.description: Hands-on assembly of quadcopters and configuring real-time telemetry systems over ArduPilot firmware.

pastEvents.title: Swarm Robotics Demonstration
pastEvents.description: Coordinated mesh networking of 10 micro-rovers performing distributed consensus-driven path alignment.

pastEvents.title: IoT Edge Compute Seminar
pastEvents.description: Deploying lightweight TensorFlow Lite models on Raspberry Pi compute modules for micro-level object recognition.
